title: astragalus polybotrys
intro: Astragalus polybotrys, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus polybotrys include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus polybotrys is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or powder, and is used to support overall health and well-being.
